definitions: A place where people keep their money safe.
The land along the side of a river.
A large group of things, like clouds or fish.
bank.example: We walked along the bank of the river.

definitions: A small animal that flies at night.
A wooden stick used to hit a ball.
bat.example: The bat flew out of the cave at night.

definitions: The brightness that lets us see things.
Not heavy; easy to lift.
Pale in color.
light.example: Turn on the light so we can read.

definitions: The flat green part of a plant or tree.
A single page of a book.
leaf.example: A yellow leaf fell from the tree.

definitions: Moving water that rises on the sea.
Moving your hand to say hello or goodbye.
wave.example: A big wave splashed on the beach.

definitions: A small circle of metal worn on a finger.
The sound a bell or phone makes.
ring.example: I heard the phone ring twice.

definitions: To look at something for a while.
A small clock you wear on your wrist.
watch.example: Let's watch the birds in the garden.

definitions: An open place with grass and trees where people play.
To leave a car in a place for a while.
park.example: We played soccer at the park.

definitions: A big hard stone.
To move gently from side to side.
A kind of loud music.
rock.example: The boat hit a rock near the shore.

definitions: A bright light we see in the night sky.
A famous person, like a singer or athlete.
A shape with five points.
star.example: The brightest star shines in the north.

definitions: To have fun with games or toys.
To make music with an instrument.
A story acted on a stage.
play.example: The children play in the yard after school.

definitions: To drop down to the ground.
The season after summer, when leaves drop.
fall.example: Be careful not to fall on the ice.

definitions: Nice and caring with other people.
A type or group of things.
kind.example: She is very kind to animals.

definitions: The sound a dog makes.
The hard outside skin of a tree.
bark.example: We heard the dog bark at the door.

definitions: To move through the air with wings.
A small insect with wings.
fly.example: Birds fly south in the winter.

definitions: In a good way.
A deep hole in the ground with water.
Healthy, not sick.
The season when flowers start to grow.
A metal coil that bounces back.
A place where water comes out of the ground.
The thick main part of a tree.
The long nose of an elephant.
A big box for keeping things.
trunk.example: The elephant lifted food with its trunk.

definitions: A small stick that makes fire.
A game between two teams.
Things that look good together.
match.example: We watched the soccer match on Sunday.

definitions: A tool used for writing with ink.
A small closed place for farm animals.
pen.example: I wrote my name with a blue pen.

definitions: Correct, with no mistakes.
The opposite side of left.
right.example: Your answer is right, good job!

definitions: Not nice; unkind to others.
What a word or sign wants to say.
With a low temperature, not warm.
A sickness that makes you sneeze.
cold.example: The water in the lake is very cold.

definitions: A very big area of salt water.
sea.example: Fish and whales live in the sea.

definitions: A small vehicle that floats and moves on water.
boat.example: We crossed the lake in a small boat.

definitions: A big cloth that catches the wind to move a boat.
To travel on water in a boat.
sail.example: The wind pushed the white sail.

definitions: Threads tied together with holes, used to catch fish.
Short for internet.
net.example: The fisher threw the net into the water.

definitions: An animal that lives and swims in water.
To try to catch fish.
fish.example: We saw colorful fish in the tank.

definitions: A tall tower with a bright light that guides boats at night.
lighthouse.example: The lighthouse helped the ship find the port.

definitions: Air that moves, sometimes very fast.
wind.example: The wind blew the leaves around.

definitions: An animal with feathers and wings that can usually fly.
bird.example: A small bird sang in the tree.

definitions: A drawing that shows where places are.
map.example: We used a map to find the museum.

definitions: Land with water all around it.
island.example: The boat took us to a small island.

definitions: Gold, jewels, or very valuable things, often hidden.
treasure.example: The pirates buried their treasure in the sand.

definitions: A tool with a needle that always points north.
compass.example: The compass showed us which way to go.

definitions: The big bright star that gives us light and heat during the day.
The big round object that shines in the sky at night.
moon.example: The full moon lit up the beach.

definitions: The clear liquid we drink and that fills rivers and seas.
water.example: Drink water when you are thirsty.

definitions: A living thing that grows in the ground, like flowers and trees.
To put seeds in the ground so they grow.
plant.example: This plant needs sun and water.

definitions: A tall plant with a trunk, branches, and leaves.
tree.example: We rested under a big tree.

definitions: The organ inside your head that thinks and remembers.
brain.example: Your brain helps you learn new things.

definitions: A food made of flour and baked in an oven.
bread.example: We ate warm bread with butter.

definitions: The place where children go to learn.
A big group of fish swimming together.
school.example: We learn to read at school.

definitions: Pages with words and pictures joined together to read.
book.example: I read a book about dinosaurs.

definitions: A building where people live.
house.example: My house has a red door.

definitions: A person you like and enjoy spending time with.
friend.example: I play with my best friend every day.

definitions: A friendly animal that barks and often lives with people.
dog.example: My dog loves to chase the ball.

definitions: A small soft animal that says meow.
cat.example: The cat sleeps on the sofa.

definitions: Drops of water that fall from the clouds.
rain.example: The rain made puddles on the street.

definitions: A white or gray shape in the sky made of tiny water drops.
cloud.example: That cloud looks like a rabbit.

definitions: The first part of the day, before noon.
morning.example: I brush my teeth every morning.

definitions: The dark part of the day, when we sleep.
What people and animals eat to live and grow.
A tale about people and things that happen, real or invented.
One floor of a building.
story.example: Grandpa told us a funny story.

definitions: A symbol of the alphabet, like A or B.
A written message you send to someone.
letter.example: I wrote a letter to my cousin.

definitions: A thing with parts that work together to do a job.
machine.example: The washing machine cleans our clothes.

definitions: A machine that stores information and runs programs.
computer.example: We use the computer to do homework.

definitions: A big town where many people live and work.
city.example: The city has tall buildings and busy streets.

definitions: A long line of water that flows to the sea.
river.example: We crossed the river on a wooden bridge.

definitions: Very high land, much bigger than a hill.
mountain.example: Snow covers the top of the mountain.

definitions: The hot bright flames made when something burns.
fire.example: We warmed our hands by the fire.

definitions: The organ that pumps blood through your body.
A shape that means love.
heart.example: Your heart beats faster when you run.

definitions: The small part of a plant that can grow into a new plant.
seed.example: We planted a sunflower seed in a pot.

definitions: A very short moment of time.
The one that comes after the first.
second.example: Wait a second, I'm almost ready.

definitions: A very big boat that travels on the sea.
ship.example: The ship carried boxes across the ocean.

definitions: A place by the sea where boats stop and load things.
port.example: The fishing boats returned to the port.
